title: Intermittent 503s on GET /v2/reports — error rate 14.1% over last 20 minutes
body: Synthetic monitoring triggered at 13:43 UTC. GET /v2/reports is returning HTTP 503 errors in bursts lasting 27s. Error rate over the last 20 minutes is 14.1%. Load balancer logs show upstream connection refused from 2 of 10 backend pods. The affected pods are not restarting — they appear alive to the health check but rejecting connections. Pattern matches connection pool exhaustion or thread pool saturation. Buy N Large support has already opened a ticket. Estimated 5191 users affected.
